description_long: This object is a compact, camouflage-patterned shotgun with a short, thick barrel and a rounded, ergonomic grip. The exterior is covered in a digital woodland camouflage texture, blending green, brown, and black tones. The barrel is single and cylindrical, with a wide opening and no visible ribbing or venting. The grip is shaped for one-handed use, resembling a pistol grip, and features a visible flame insignia on both sides. The trigger is exposed, and the trigger guard is thin and angular, integrated into the frame. The overall design is utilitarian and rugged, suitable for close-quarters use in urban or tactical environments.
description: A compact, camouflage-patterned shotgun with a short barrel, pistol grip, and exposed trigger, designed for close-quarters use.
description_view_0: Left side view showing the camouflage pattern, flame insignia, and the full profile of the grip and barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide, open muzzle of the single barrel and the cylindrical shape.
description_view_2: Right side view mirroring the left, with the camouflage pattern, flame insignia, and grip profile visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrel with the frame.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: thin, angular, and integrated into the frame with no finger grooves or reinforcement
